title: Extend review packet schema for human-facing quality and organization diagnosis
description: Add structured audience-facing review fields to council-review-packet so review-validity benchmarks can be machine-checked instead of relying on free-form rationale text alone.
triage_notes: Completed on 2026-06-15 by extending council-review-packet with target_audience, expected_user_reaction, blocking_reasons, artifact_change_recommendations, organization_change_recommendations, and human_override_signal. RV-001 now uses the structured fields in a recorded benchmark review packet.
